description:
Spotify to Teams Status Sync

Automatically syncs your currently playing Spotify track to your Microsoft Teams status message. Set a custom status message using placeholders like {artist}, {track}, {album}, and {emoji}.
What's Changed
- fix: quick wins from v2.5.0 code review by @Carme99 in #44
- fix: token-refresh lost-update races (Spotify and Teams) by @Carme99 in #43
- fix: polling cadence cleanup (config wiring, backoff, presence-clearing, expires_at check) by @Carme99 in #45
- refactor: make is_onboarding_complete async with 30s result cache by @Carme99 in #47
- fix(perf): use spawn_blocking for OAuth callback HTTP calls by @Carme99 in #46
- chore: address 4 outstanding issues (#9, #12, #13, #16) by @Carme99 in #49
- chore(release): 2.5.1 — doc and changelog pass by @Carme99 in #48
- chore(release): bump version to 2.6.0 by @Carme99 in #50
Full Changelog: v2.5.0...v2.6.0
